name: pds-assistant
description: Find the right NASA Planetary Data System (PDS) datasets for a planetary-science query: route to the correct PDS node, walk the live archive directories, and return grounded dataset identifiers and paths.

pds_stage1_mcp_key.title: PDS Stage 1 API token
pds_stage1_mcp_key.description: FastMCP token (fmcp_...) for the PDS Stage 1 MCP server (live archive directory walking: pds_list_missions, pds_list_dataset_dirs, pds_probe_datasets, ...). Leave blank if the server is public.

pds_stage2_mcp_key.title: PDS Stage 2 API token
pds_stage2_mcp_key.description: FastMCP token (fmcp_...) for the PDS Stage 2 MCP server (faceted/granule search: ode_*, opus_*, img_*, sbn_*, pds4* tools). Leave blank if the server is public.
